description: adversarial red-team: tamper a Ledger-v2 record — the chain verifier (verify_chain) must refuse. Software tier (SV-1/SV-2), NOT the SV-3 kernel boundary.
rules: mounts a real attack in a throwaway sandbox (never touches the live tree)
asserts the boundary (infra.cwp.chainverify.verify_chain) REFUSES the attack — a recorded refusal is evidence (M4)
carries an ORACLE: a clean control must be ACCEPTED, so the perk goes RED if the gate goes silently no-op
exit 0 iff the boundary held; nonzero iff the attack got through (a breach)
usage: No inputs. Output: redteam.json with {attack, clean_accepted, refused, boundary_held}.
limitation: Software-trust boundary only. The SV-3 kernel corpus (scan-disabled, over exod/sandbox) is the kernel cws-redteam (P2-T08), gated on the exod subject.
